items.title: Hyperparameter grid search on small tabular data
items.description: When n is a few hundred rows, GridSearchCV with 5-fold inner CV selects ridge α, lasso α, or SVM C without overfitting penalty choice to one validation cut.

items.title: Random forest complexity control
items.description: Compare `max_depth` and `min_samples_leaf` settings via stratified CV mean AUC; prefer configurations with strong mean and low fold std before production.

items.title: Algorithm shootouts under data scarcity
items.description: Choose between linear, tree, and kernel models on train+val using repeated or standard k-fold CV when a fixed validation block would be too small to trust.

items.title: Unbiased reporting after heavy tuning
items.description: Use nested CV outer scores when many hyperparameters or models were compared—inner CV picks settings; outer folds estimate generalization without tuning optimism.
